description:
reporter {user.legal_reporter} page <number> year <number>
    - cite statute title <number> section <user.text> year <number>"

    This is much better. I'll use this.

    Wait, "no markdown formatting". I'll remove the dashes and just use spacing.

    "Create a 3-file Talon module in a new 'legal_citations' directory at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\legal_citations\ that formats Bluebook legal citations.

    The reporters.talon-list file must define the user.legal_reporter list with these mappings:
    united states: U.S.
    supreme court: S. Ct.
    lawyers edition: L
